pi_items.source: export_result.sh TARGET_FILE variable and task.json instructions
verifier.py points_count check and task.json instructions

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 3D model of a cam plate from scratch in SolveSpace, meaning there is no pre-existing dataset and the process is synthetic. The expected output file path is strictly enforced as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cam_plate.slvs by the export_result.sh script. The verifier logic explicitly requires a minimum of 6 control points (min_points: 6), aligning with the 6 waypoints provided in the task instructions. The instructions also explicitly require an extrusion depth of 10 mm, although the export scripts merely confirm the existence of an extrusion group without programmatically validating its exact depth.
